title: oldenlandia hedyotoides
intro: Oldenlandia hedyotoides, also known as Bia Ye or Chinese ephedra, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia hedyotoides include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
